message:
fix: resolve nightly consistency-test failures (join guard + fetch timeout) (#5382)

Guard .join() calls on prefillIds/decodeIds in PDDisaggregation with
|| [] fallback, and add AbortSignal.timeout to agentFetch so every
fetch() call has a signal (MCP_HOOK_TIMEOUT_MS = 15s default).

The other two nightly failures (unit-test ratchet bump and gosec #nosec
G402 annotation) were already fixed in earlier PRs that merged after the
Apr 6 nightly ran.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
